description: As Tow Operators, our crews know just how dangerous it is to work alongside the roadways and highways of Michigan; and they do it night and day. Our thoughts and prayers go out to the families and co-workers who have been affected by this tragedy. Just like 1st Responders, we all would like to be able to go home at the end of our shift to loved ones. PLEASE, PLEASE SLOW DOWN AND MOVE OVER so that perhaps someone you know or love can make it home safely.

layoutDescription: Typography-led: hero is mostly type (72px+ display), photo secondary or below fold; high contrast color blocks between sections.
mood: Reliable, local, ready when you need us — competent and direct
antiPatterns: No menu or reservation language. Phone must be tel: in header and hero. Sticky mobile call bar required. Industrial clarity beats decoration.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
